speaker: pro
text: Pro opening: Replacement deserves a fair trial when it improves feedback speed, personalization, and accountability. No prior claims have been made. The burden is to compare replacement against supplementation, not against doing nothing.

speaker: con
text: Con opening: Replacement is too strong because homework also builds practice habits, teacher context, and equitable routines. Prior claims: pro_opening. The burden is to compare replacement against supplementation, not against doing nothing.

speaker: con
